text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ow, ow, ow… Been a while since I've gotten this sore… Talk about lame…

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yesterday I found a car that had run into 
the ditch. These aches and pains are from 
dragging it back onto the road.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The old lady driving was fine, and I managed 
to get the tires too, but…

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I don't know, the fact that something 
so small wore me out is so uncool…
